sections.heading: Search Interest in Australia

sections.heading: World Cup Final Coverage
paragraphs: The Guardian reports on a World Cup final match between Spain and Argentina, focusing on the referee, statistics, and omens. FOX Sports also published coverage regarding the referees for the 2026 World Cup final involving these teams.

sections.heading: Referee Information
paragraphs: ESPN identifies Slavko Vincic as the referee for the Spain vs. Argentina World Cup final. The report notes that the official has previously drawn backlash from Real Madrid and received praise from Jose Mourinho.
